design_philosophy.visual_style: Clean, geometric, text-focused, with rich organic accents.

usage_rules.headings: Use 'Amiri' for all H1-H3. It conveys tradition and authority. Font weights: 700 for H1, 400 for H2/H3.
usage_rules.body: Use 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic' for all UI text, buttons, and long-form reading. It ensures high legibility on screens.
usage_rules.quran_text: Always use 'Amiri' or a specialized Quranic font if available for actual Quran verses.

primary.description: Deep Emerald Green - Represents growth, paradise, and tradition.

secondary.description: Rich Gold - Represents sacredness and premium quality. Use for accents, borders, and icons.

background.description: Warm Cream/Off-White. Avoid pure #FFFFFF for main backgrounds; use it for cards only.

accent.description: Muted Sage Green - For secondary buttons or active states.

grid_system.marketing: The 'Tetris' Grid (Mode A). Use asymmetric spans to create visual interest. Don't just stack centered text.
grid_system.dashboard: The 'Control Room' Grid (Mode B). Dense, data-rich, but with 'breathing room' padding.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-full px-8 py-6

cards.style: bg-white border border-secondary/20 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
cards.decoration: Optional: Add a top border-t-4 border-secondary to signify importance.

inputs.style: bg-white border-input focus:border-primary focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg h-12

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle noise texture (opacity 0.03) on the main background to give a 'paper' feel.
visual_enhancers.patterns: Use Islamic geometric patterns as SVG backgrounds in Hero sections or Card headers. Opacity should be low (5-10%).
visual_enhancers.icons: Use Lucide React. Style them with the Gold color (#D4AF37) when used as features.

hero_bg.usage: Use with heavy overlay for hero background.

pattern_accent.usage: Small accent image or card background.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Set 'dir=rtl' on the root html element immediately.
Configure Tailwind with the custom colors defined above.
Import the Google Fonts in the main CSS file.
Use 'Amiri' for all Arabic headings. It is non-negotiable for the brand feel.

Ensure all layouts work in RTL. Use logical properties (ps-*, pe-*) or standard Tailwind classes knowing they flip automatically in RTL mode if configured, but standard 'left/right' might need manual checking. Prefer 'start/end' logic.
Do not use gradients for text. Keep text solid high-contrast.
For the 'Live Classroom', use a clean, distraction-free layout with dark mode option for the video container only.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for overlays.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' attribute.
